# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud network security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_network_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  vnetName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Virtual Network
    minLength: 2
    maxLength: 64
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources
    allowedValues:
      - eastus
      - eastus2
      - westus
      - westus2
      - centralus
      - northeurope
      - westeurope
      - southeastasia
      - australiaeast
      - uksouth
  vnetAddressPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.0.0/16
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the Virtual Network
    allowedValues:
      - 10.0.0.0/16
      - 10.1.0.0/16
      - 10.2.0.0/16
      - 172.16.0.0/16
  webSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.1.0/24
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the Web tier subnet
  appSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.2.0/24
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the App tier subnet
  dbSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.3.0/24
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the Database tier subnet
  environment:
    type: string
    defaultValue: dev
    allowedValues:
      - dev
      - staging
      - prod
    metadata:
      description: Environment tag for the deployment

variables:
  webSubnetName: snet-web
  appSubnetName: snet-app
  dbSubnetName: snet-db
  webNsgName: "[concat('nsg-web-', parameters('environment'))]"
  appNsgName: "[concat('nsg-app-', parameters('environment'))]"
  dbNsgName: "[concat('nsg-db-', parameters('environment'))]"

resources:
  # NSG for Web Tier - Only allows HTTPS inbound from Internet, denies all other inbound
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[variables('webNsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      tier: web
    properties:
      securityRules:
        # Allow HTTPS inbound from Internet
        - name: Allow-HTTPS-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "443"
            description: Allow HTTPS traffic from Internet to web tier
        # Allow HTTP inbound (redirect to HTTPS) - optional, can be removed if not needed
        - name: Allow-HTTP-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 110
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "80"
            description: Allow HTTP traffic for HTTPS redirect
        # Deny all other inbound from Internet explicitly
        - name: Deny-All-Other-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 4000
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny all other inbound traffic from Internet
        # Allow outbound only to App subnet on specific port
        - name: Allow-To-App-Tier
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Outbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "8443"
            description: Allow web tier to communicate with app tier on port 8443
        # Deny direct access from web to database tier
        - name: Deny-To-DB-Tier
          properties:
            priority: 200
            direction: Outbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny direct access from web tier to database tier

  # NSG for App Tier - Only allows traffic from Web subnet, no Internet access
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[variables('appNsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      tier: app
    properties:
      securityRules:
        # Allow inbound only from Web tier on specific port
        - name: Allow-From-Web-Tier
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "8443"
            description: Allow inbound from web tier on port 8443
        # Deny all inbound from Internet
        - name: Deny-Internet-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 200
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny all inbound from Internet to app tier
        # Deny all other inbound
        - name: Deny-All-Other-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 4000
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny all other inbound traffic
        # Allow outbound to Database tier on SQL port only
        - name: Allow-To-DB-Tier
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Outbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "1433"
            description: Allow app tier to communicate with database tier on SQL port
        # Deny direct outbound to Internet
        - name: Deny-Internet-Outbound
          properties:
            priority: 200
            direction: Outbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: Internet
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny direct Internet access from app tier

  # NSG for Database Tier - Most restrictive, only allows from App subnet
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[variables('dbNsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      tier: database
    properties:
      securityRules:
        # Allow inbound only from App tier on SQL port
        - name: Allow-From-App-Tier
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "1433"
            description: Allow inbound from app tier on SQL port 1433
        # Deny inbound from Web tier
        - name: Deny-From-Web-Tier
          properties:
            priority: 200
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny all inbound from web tier to database tier
        # Deny all inbound from Internet
        - name: Deny-Internet-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 300
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny all inbound from Internet to database tier
        # Deny all other inbound
        - name: Deny-All-Other-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 4000
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny all other inbound traffic
        # Deny all outbound to Internet
        - name: Deny-Internet-Outbound
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Outbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: Internet
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny all Internet outbound from database tier
        # Deny outbound to Web tier
        - name: Deny-To-Web-Tier
          properties:
            priority: 200
            direction: Outbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny outbound from database tier to web tier

  # Virtual Network with three-tier subnets
  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[parameters('vnetName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      purpose: three-tier-application
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('webNsgName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('appNsgName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('dbNsgName'))]"
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - "[parameters('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
      # Encryption in transit for VNet traffic
      encryption:
        enabled: true
        enforcement: AllowUnencrypted
      subnets:
        # Web Tier Subnet - public-facing
        - name: "[variables('webSubnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('webNsgName'))]"
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Enabled
            privateLinkServiceNetworkPolicies: Enabled
            defaultOutboundAccess: false
        # App Tier Subnet - internal application logic
        - name: "[variables('appSubnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('appNsgName'))]"
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Enabled
            privateLinkServiceNetworkPolicies: Enabled
            defaultOutboundAccess: false
        # Database Tier Subnet - most restricted
        - name: "[variables('dbSubnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('dbNsgName'))]"
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Enabled
            privateLinkServiceNetworkPolicies: Enabled
            defaultOutboundAccess: false

outputs:
  vnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"
  vnetName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('vnetName')]"
  webSubnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), variables('webSubnetName'))]"
  appSubnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), variables('appSubnetName'))]"
  dbSubnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), variables('dbSubnetName'))]"
  webNsgId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('webNsgName'))]"
  appNsgId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('appNsgName'))]"
  dbNsgId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('dbNsgName'))]"
